html: **28 Feb 2025** — Invited Speaker at the 2nd Physical Retail AI Workshop @ IEEE/CVF WACV 2025: _"On the role of Extended Artificial Intelligence in the future of physical retail"_. [Workshop page](https://grocery-vision.github.io/wacv2025.html)
**21 Jan 2025** — Invited Talk at the VARLAB seminar series, University of Bologna.

**06 Oct 2023** — Invited Talk at the 2nd Workshop _Italian Feminist Photography_ (PRIN, University of Parma): _"Pattern exploration and discovery in feminist photography through XR and AI"_. [Programme](https://site.unibo.it/fotografia-femminista-italiana/it/agenda/2-workshop-prin-fotografia-femminista-italiana)
**27 Jun 2023** — PhD lecture on Extended Reality, PhD programme in _Cultural Heritage in the Digital Ecosystem_.
**19 Jan 2023** — PhD lecture _Fashion RE-volution & RE-Activation_ (with Prof. Gustavo Marfia and Prof. Chiara Pompa), PhD Digital Humanities IV, University of Parma.
